title: Bus Breakdown
description: The tour bus sputters and dies on a highway. Ryder is furious. Jet is somehow asleep.
speaker: Ryder Blaze
text: Seriously?! We're five hours from Nashville and the bus decides NOW is the time?

choices.label: Call a mechanic. Pay to fix it fast.
choices.outcome: You pay $150 for an emergency fix. Back on the road in two hours.

choices.label: Push the bus to the next exit and figure it out.
choices.outcome: Ryder thinks it's hilarious. Nova documents the chaos.

title: Superfan on the Highway
description: A car pulls alongside holding a sign: HONK IF YOURE TOUR LIFE.
speaker: Jet
text: That was me. I honked. They're following us - should we pull over?

choices.label: Pull over. Meet the fans.
choices.outcome: Best twenty minutes of the road trip. It goes viral.

choices.label: Keep driving.
choices.outcome: Nova approves. The fans post a disappointed TikTok.

title: Truck Stop Brawl
description: Ryder got into it with someone at a diner.
speaker: Nova Wilde
text: I need a decision NOW. Ryder is outside with three large men.

choices.label: Pull Ryder out before it escalates.
choices.outcome: You defuse it. No blood. No headlines.

choices.label: Film it. Content is content.
choices.outcome: The clip gets 200K views. Ryder doesn"t speak to you for two days.

title: Surprise Radio Call-In
description: A local station wants a live phone interview right now.
speaker: Nova Wilde
text: Free press. Your call - thirty seconds.

choices.label: Do it. Improvise.
choices.outcome: You kill it. The station plays your track three times.

choices.label: Pass. Not prepared.
choices.outcome: Nova handles it. She doesn't let you forget it.

title: Jet's Mystery Call
description: Jet takes a call and comes back looking shaken.
speaker: Jet
text: That was... nothing. Fine. How much further to Nashville?

choices.label: Push him on it.
choices.outcome: He admits a debt collector knows the tour schedule.

choices.label: Leave it alone.
choices.outcome: Jet nods. Puts his headphones on.
